raw_normalized_error_bound.statement: for all even n > threshold, |((RawVonMangoldtGoldbachSum(n) - goldbachSingularSeriesFromQuarter(n) * n) / (goldbachSingularSeriesFromQuarter(n) * n))| <= relativeError

notes: Template only. This is the narrow quarter-base canonical HL certificate. Lean fixes the singular-series field to goldbachSingularSeriesFromQuarter, fixes the lower coefficient to 1/4, and supplies the singular-series lower bound internally. The remaining analytic obligation is the pointwise normalized raw von Mangoldt error, plus final canonical contamination threshold coverage.
